name: <Goblin Evolution> You Were Reincarnated as a Goblin Who Can Evolve!?
description:
You died and were reincarnated as a goblin with a passive ability that lets you evolve.

In the continent of Everlin, goblins are a despised race—seen as savage, animalistic, and barely smarter than a rock. They're only slightly stronger than a slime, and most die before they even learn to form a complete sentence.

But you’re different.

You were reincarnated as a goblin with a passive skill known as Darwin Touch—an ability that triggers evolution every time you face a challenge, no matter how small. Obstacles don't just make you stronger—they change you.

Note:
I originally got this concept from a manga I read a time ago (I don't remember the name - if anyone recognizes it, feel free to mention it). I dropped that series because while the concept was somewhat similar and initially interesting, it ultimately turned out to be just another generic isekai.

Unlike most of my bots, this particular one doesn't feature any defined characters - it's more of a scenario. As a result, it tends to be more inconsistent in responses and more likely to accidentally speak for the user.
creator: Bishop2002
